name: vendor.myndhyve.market-intel-ad-angles
description: MyndHyve market-intel.ad-angles — generates 5-10 ad-angle briefs from VoC research + ICP/product context via one AI call. Each brief carries angleName, segment, corePain, promise, mechanism, proof requirements, objections to handle, 3-5 hook variants, recommended CTA, source quotes, and a 5-dimension score (volume / intensity / commercialIntent / clarity / uniqueness + weighted total). Briefs are sorted by total score descending. Second marketIntel pack of the Stage 5 cohort.
author: MyndHyve

nodes.label: Generate Ad Angle Briefs
nodes.description: Single AI call. Input: VoC quotes (pains/desires/objections/triggers/proofRequests/alternatives) + ICP + product + top communities + optional competitors. Output: scored ad-angle briefs ranked by total score, segmentBreakdown, crossAngleThemes, testingPriority. Soft validation: invalid briefs are dropped with per-brief warnings.
